LAW AND MOTION 301, HEARING FOR PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD MOTION POS FILED 13/DEC/01 MOVING AND OPPOSING PARTIES APPEARED. A R G U E D AND THE COURT GRANTED THE MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION. COUNSEL SHALL PREPARE AN ORDER CONSISTENT WITH THE COURT'S RULING AND ALSO INSTRUCT THE ARBITRATOR TO DETERMINE COLLECTIVE BARGAINING AGREEMENT; INCLUDING OR EXCLUDING THE ADMIMINSTRATIVE LEAVE PROCEEDING. HON. JAMES J. MCBRIDE. REPORTED BY ERIC THRONE. CSR 7855 (GPS)

calendar.matters:
HEARING FOR PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD
Off Calendar Jan-25-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Vincent A. Harrington, Esq. of VAN BOURG, WEINBERG 510/839-6600 for Petitioner SOCIAL SERVICES UNTION, SEIU, LOCAL 535 moving to compel arbitration
Cara E. Lankford, Deputy City Attorney 554-4274 for Respondents CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO and ANDREA GOURDINE opposing party
A R G U E D and the Court granted the motion to compel arbitration. Counsel shall prepare an order consistent with the Court's ruling and also instruct the arbitrator to determine collective bargaining agreement; including or excluding the admiminstrative leave proceeding.
(JJM/kh) Eric L. Throne, CSR 7855

MOTION /Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Compel Arbitration
Off Calendar Dec-04-2001 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. Tentative ruling adopted -- Petitioner SOCIAL SERVICES UNION SEIU, LOCAL 535 petition is ordered OFF CALENDAR -- no proof of service. (AJR/sl)
